issues.title: Analysis page does not provide deeper analysis than Dashboard
issues.description: The Analysis page shows the same TimeseriesChart and ArrestRateChart as Dashboard. A journalist expects correlation analysis, distribution plots, or trend decomposition.
issues.expected: Correlation matrix, distribution plots, seasonal decomposition

issues.title: No narrative or story suggestions
issues.description: A journalist wants the system to suggest angles: 'Theft spiked 30% in Q3 2025' or 'Arrest rates are lowest in District 7'. No story suggestions are provided.
reproduction_steps: Look for story suggestions or angle recommendations
issues.expected: Auto-generated story suggestions based on data patterns

summary: Analysis page is a thin wrapper around Dashboard without deeper analytical capability for journalism.
